extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Policy Year 2021-2022: 8 claims with Total Paid of $56,343, Total Incurred of $56,343, Primary Losses of $56,343, and Excess Losses of $0. Experience rating formula: Mod = (Ap + W x Ae + (1 - W) x Ee + B) / (E + B). Weighting Value (W): 0.419. Ballast Value (B): $29,114. Numerator: $367,465. Denominator: $390,920. Computed Modification Factor: 0.9400. Final Experience Modification Factor: 0.94. Approved 03/15/2026 by Analyst ID RA-2930. Insured may request review or appeal within 90 days of effective date.
